All screwdrivers are insulated to prevent electric shock, as detailed below:

Slotted (SL):

1 piece, size SL4.0 x 100 mm.

1 piece, size SL5.0 x 125 mm.

Forked-beaked fish (Phillips - PH):

1 piece, size PH0 x 60 mm.

Insulated pliers (3 pieces)

Combination pliers: 1 piece, 8 inches.

Long nose pliers: 1 piece, 8 inches.

Diagonal Cutting Pliers: 1 piece, 6 inches.

testing equipment

Voltage tester screwdriver (Test pencil): 1 piece

Packaged in a canvas bag for easy storage and carrying.

BLACK+DECKER BMT108C Hand Tool Kit for Home & DIY Use

(108-Piece)

BLACK+DECKER BMT108C is a complete hand tool kit for all your household and office maintenance needs. It is stylish, compact and provides a good assortment of tools with no compromise on the quality.

BLACK+DECKER BMT108C includes assortment of tools for your daily maintenance at home and office
  • A compact, lightweight and perfect hand tool kit for household DIY tasks & emergency maintenance
  • Adjustable Wrench, Long Nose Pliers, Combination Pliers, LED Flashlight, Snap-Off Utility Knife,
  • Include Screwdriver 22 bits with 6 different socket. It is used for screw tightening or loosening.
  • 18mm snap-off knife useful for cutting paper, soft plastic, small rope and thread.Adjustable Wrench
  • Sharp claw for easy nail removal. Strong head and a soft grip for long time usage.
  • 3m Measuring Tape-It has lock on feature for easy use. Mini Hacksaw - Sharp blade with strong body.
  • 8 Hex key with size varying from 1.5 to 6mm. Used for tightening and loosening screws

108 Piece Hand Tool Kit

  • 1- Stubby Adjustable Wrench Carbon Steel, 1- 160mm Long Nose Pliers Carbon Steel
  • 1- 160mm Combination Pliers Carbon Steel, 1- 9-LED Flashlight, 1- 18mm Snap-Off Utility Knife
  • 1- 3m Measuring Tape (MID), 1- 8oz Claw Hammer, 1- 140mm Tester (VDE)
  • 1- Insulated Tape, 0.13x18mmx10m, 6- 1/4inch Dr. Socket, CrV, Chrome Plated, 5-6-7-8-9-10mm
  • 1- 1/4inch Dr. Bit Adapter, 3- Masonry Drill, 1- 150mm Mini Hacksaw
  • 8- Hex Key: 1.5-2-2.5-3-4-5-5.5-6mm, 10- 25mm Bits, CrV, Sand Blasted, 1- Stubby Ratchet Screwdriver
  • 1- Precision Bit Holder, 12- 4x28mm Precision Screwdriver (CrV)
  • 56-Screw 3x30, 4x35 and 5x50. S Plug 5x30, 6x30, 8x35 Blow Molded Case 38.6x30x8.8cm Color Sleeve

Introduction Summary:

The HOTO Hand Tool Set is a thoughtfully curated collection designed for homeowners, DIY enthusiasts, and anyone seeking a reliable toolkit for everyday tasks. Combining sleek aesthetics with functional design, this set ensures you’re equipped for a variety of home repairs and projects.

Features:

  • Minimalist Design: Enjoy a sleek and aesthetically pleasing design that complements any workspace.
  • Timeless Appeal: A classic hand tool set that combines style and functionality for a timeless look.
  • Premium Materials: Crafted with top-quality materials to ensure durability and reliable performance.

Specification:

Product Weight: 1710g

Claw Hammer: 24 x 105 x 240mm

Precision Screwdriver: 30 x 198mm

S2 Steel Screw Bits: C6.3 x 25mm

Needlenose Plier: 15.6 x 55 x 169mm

Spanner: 13.6 x 56.5 x 200mm

Measuring Tape: 26.8 x 60 x 70mm

Tool Box: 70 x 167 x 268mm

Product Materials: Steel, PP, ABS

", "highlights": "
  • Magnetic Hammer with Rubber Cap: Provides stable nailing while the removable rubber cap protects surfaces from dents or scratches.
  • Adjustable Spanner: Easily adapts to various nut and bolt sizes, reducing the need for multiple wrenches.
  • Needle-Nose Pliers: Slim profile allows for precision gripping and bending in tight spaces. Includes cutting functionality.
  • Manual Screwdriver + 10 Bits: Comes with 10 high-hardness S2 steel bits for durability and compatibility with common screw types.
  • Self-Locking Measuring Tape: Automatically locks in place when extended; retracts smoothly with one hand.
  • Sleek Tool Case: Keeps tools organized in a compact, durable case — great for home storage or carrying on the go.
  • Minimalist Aesthetic: Modern design with neutral tones blends well in any home or workspace.
  • Built for Everyday Use: Ideal for small repairs, furniture assembly, hanging decor, or hobby tasks.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Milwaukee 48-22-9038 3/8\" Drive Low Profile Ratchet Heavy-Duty Hand Tool for Mechanics & Professional Repair ✨ Key Features 1. Ultra-Low Profile Head Design Engineered with a slim, low-profile ratchet head, this tool delivers access to tight, confined spaces where standard ratchets cannot reach. Perfect for engine bays, under-dash work, and tight industrial assemblies, maximizing reach in hard-to-access areas. 2. High-Torque, Durable Gear Mechanism Features a precision 90-tooth ratchet mechanism with a 4° arc swing, requiring minimal movement to turn fasteners. The hardened steel gear system delivers exceptional torque strength, withstanding heavy-duty use without slipping or stripping. 3. Industrial-Grade Chrome Vanadium Steel Construction Forged from premium heat-treated chrome vanadium steel, the ratchet offers superior strength, wear resistance, and corrosion protection. It meets strict ANSI torque standards, ensuring reliable performance for years of professional use. 4. Ergonomic, Non-Slip Handle Design The textured, contoured handle provides a secure, comfortable grip, even in oily or wet working conditions. The ergonomic shape reduces hand fatigue during extended use, improving control and efficiency on every job. 5. Quick-Release & Reversible Operation Equipped with a convenient quick-release button for fast socket changes, and a smooth reversing lever for instant direction switching. Streamlines workflow, saving time on repetitive fastening and loosening tasks. 🛠️ Wide Application Scenarios Automotive Repair & Maintenance : Ideal for mechanics working on engines, transmissions, and vehicle chassis in garages and auto shops. Construction & Contracting : Perfect for carpenters, electricians, and plumbers performing assembly, installation, and repair on job sites. Industrial & Mechanical Work : Essential for maintenance technicians servicing machinery, equipment, and industrial systems. DIY & Home Repairs : A must-have for homeowners tackling automotive work, furniture assembly, and general household maintenance. Aerospace & Precision Assembly : Suitable for technicians working in tight spaces in aerospace, aviation, and precision manufacturing environments."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S763b01687e114acaabbbe89a5c745befo.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S860d53785fac4c5dbf39bfeb1c8302a5O.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S729bac5ba6b840ca9d5f7fa7bb92639bN.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S83ae9ae7cc5c4de68d1e2d04d7511ffay.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S01e193f2dcb64cd0a37fe9c9bf3f0cd48.jpg"}]

Milwaukee 48-22-9038 3/8\" Drive Low Profile Ratchet Heavy-Duty Hand Tool for Mechanics & Professional Repair

✨ Key Features

1. Ultra-Low Profile Head Design

Engineered with a slim, low-profile ratchet head, this tool delivers access to tight, confined spaces where standard ratchets cannot reach. Perfect for engine bays, under-dash work, and tight industrial assemblies, maximizing reach in hard-to-access areas.

2. High-Torque, Durable Gear Mechanism

Features a precision 90-tooth ratchet mechanism with a 4° arc swing, requiring minimal movement to turn fasteners. The hardened steel gear system delivers exceptional torque strength, withstanding heavy-duty use without slipping or stripping.

3. Industrial-Grade Chrome Vanadium Steel Construction

Forged from premium heat-treated chrome vanadium steel, the ratchet offers superior strength, wear resistance, and corrosion protection. It meets strict ANSI torque standards, ensuring reliable performance for years of professional use.

4. Ergonomic, Non-Slip Handle Design

The textured, contoured handle provides a secure, comfortable grip, even in oily or wet working conditions. The ergonomic shape reduces hand fatigue during extended use, improving control and efficiency on every job.

5. Quick-Release & Reversible Operation

Equipped with a convenient quick-release button for fast socket changes, and a smooth reversing lever for instant direction switching. Streamlines workflow, saving time on repetitive fastening and loosening tasks.

🛠️ Wide Application Scenarios

  • Automotive Repair & Maintenance: Ideal for mechanics working on engines, transmissions, and vehicle chassis in garages and auto shops.

  • Construction & Contracting: Perfect for carpenters, electricians, and plumbers performing assembly, installation, and repair on job sites.

  • Industrial & Mechanical Work: Essential for maintenance technicians servicing machinery, equipment, and industrial systems.

  • DIY & Home Repairs: A must-have for homeowners tackling automotive work, furniture assembly, and general household maintenance.

  • Aerospace & Precision Assembly: Suitable for technicians working in tight spaces in aerospace, aviation, and precision manufacturing environments.
